results.rendered_html:
prota p. p. [pra-ve-syūtau-kta saṃprasāraṇaṃ]
1
1 Sewn, stitched;  Ku. 7. 49. 
2 Extended lengthwise or perpendicularly (opp. ota).
3 Tied, bound, fastened;  Mv. 6. 33. 
4 Pierced, transfixed;  R. 9. 75. 
5 Passed or come through; taruchidraprotān i. e. (caṃdrokaraṇān) bisamiti karī
(pb) saṃkalayati  K. P. 10. 
6 Set, inlaid;  Mv. 1. 35. 
7 Joined, connected.
— taṃ A garment, woven cloth.
Comp.
— utsādanaṃ
1 an umbrella.
2 a cloth house, tent.
